message: npm dependency install for pdfjs-dist failed due registry/network reset, so Phase 3 uses built-in macOS PDFKit instead of adding npm dependencies.
Selection and judgment questions are extracted from '第 N 题'; programming questions are extracted from top-level '3.N 编程题' and use '试题名称' as title.
C++ level 5 official PDF produced 27 records: 15 selection, 10 judgment, 2 programming.
